requirement_topic.en: EAEU EMC Conformity — TR CU 020/2011 and IEC 61000 Evidence for PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: EAEU EMC符合性——光伏逆变器TR CU 020/2011及IEC 61000证据
requirement_topic.zht: EAEU EMC符合性——光伏逆變器TR CU 020/2011及IEC 61000證據

summary.en: Kyrgyzstan is an EAEU member state, so PV inverters with electronic power-conversion circuits and grid interfaces commonly require EAEU EMC conformity assessment under TR CU 020/2011 when the product is in scope. The EAC technical file should address emissions, immunity, harmonics, flicker where relevant, installation conditions, cable lengths, filters, grounding, operating modes, and firmware profiles relevant to grid-connected inverter use. Kyrgyzstandart / GOST / IEC evidence may be requested by local counterparties or project owners in addition to EAEU documentation.
summary.zh: 吉尔吉斯斯坦是EAEU成员国，因此带有电子功率变换电路和电网接口的光伏逆变器在产品落入范围时，通常需要按TR CU 020/2011进行EAEU EMC符合性评价。EAC技术文件应覆盖与并网逆变器使用相关的发射、抗扰度、谐波、适用时的闪变、安装条件、电缆长度、滤波器、接地、运行模式和固件配置。当地合作方或项目业主可能在EAEU文件之外要求Kyrgyzstandart/GOST/IEC证据。
summary.zht: 吉爾吉斯斯坦是EAEU成員國，因此帶有電子功率變換電路和電網介面的光伏逆變器在產品落入範圍時，通常需要按TR CU 020/2011進行EAEU EMC符合性評價。EAC技術文件應覆蓋與併網逆變器使用相關的發射、抗擾度、諧波、適用時的閃變、安裝條件、電纜長度、濾波器、接地、運行模式和韌體配置。當地合作方或項目業主可能在EAEU文件之外要求Kyrgyzstandart/GOST/IEC證據。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 020/2011 — Electromagnetic compatibility of technical devices
EAEU EAC marking and technical-file requirements for EMC-regulated products
IEC 61000 series EMC evidence where requested by the EAEU body, Kyrgyzstandart route, grid operator, or project owner
IEC 61727 utility-interface behavior where relevant to grid-connected PV

summary.en: China-side packages often include GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, GB/T 19964-2024, and EMC test evidence generated for Chinese, IEC/CISPR, or other export markets. Those reports may help build the EAEU technical file but must be checked against TR CU 020/2011, the exact EAC conformity route, and any standards named by the Kyrgyzstan or EAEU conformity body.
summary.zh: 中国侧资料包通常包括GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、GB/T 19964-2024以及面向中国、IEC/CISPR或其他出口市场形成的EMC测试证据。这些报告可帮助建立EAEU技术文件，但须按TR CU 020/2011、具体EAC符合性路径，以及吉尔吉斯斯坦或EAEU符合性机构指定的标准进行核对。
summary.zht: 中國側資料包通常包括GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、GB/T 19964-2024以及面向中國、IEC/CISPR或其他出口市場形成的EMC測試證據。這些報告可幫助建立EAEU技術文件，但須按TR CU 020/2011、具體EAC符合性路徑，以及吉爾吉斯斯坦或EAEU符合性機構指定的標準進行核對。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
CISPR / IEC 61000 series test evidence where available

gap.en: The practical gap is not only EMC test limits. The EAEU file must match the exact model, hardware revision, firmware, filters, manuals, grid parameters, installation category, and intended operating modes. Reports prepared for China or another export market may need delta review, translation, local applicant control, EAEU laboratory acceptance, or retesting.
gap.zh: 实际差距不只是EMC测试限值。EAEU文件必须匹配具体型号、硬件版本、固件、滤波器、说明书、电网参数、安装类别和预期运行模式。为中国或其他出口市场准备的报告可能需要差异审查、翻译、本地申请人控制、EAEU实验室接受或重新测试。
gap.zht: 實際差距不只是EMC測試限值。EAEU文件必須匹配具體型號、硬體版本、韌體、濾波器、說明書、電網參數、安裝類別和預期運行模式。為中國或其他出口市場準備的報告可能需要差異審查、翻譯、本地申請人控制、EAEU實驗室接受或重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the inverter is within TR CU 020/2011 EMC scope; additional Kyrgyzstandart, grid-operator, or project-owner EMC evidence may be project-specific
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T or IEC/CISPR reports are supporting evidence only and are not automatic EAEU EMC conformity for Kyrgyzstan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC reports from China or other markets should be treated as input evidence, not as automatic TR CU 020/2011 compliance for Kyrgyzstan. Confirm the EAC route, applicant role, accepted test standards, model-family coverage, and whether IEC 61000 evidence must be supplemented for the exact inverter configuration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 来自中国或其他市场的EMC报告应作为输入证据，而不是吉尔吉斯斯坦TR CU 020/2011自动合规证明。请确认EAC路径、申请人角色、可接受测试标准、型号系列覆盖范围，以及IEC 61000证据是否须针对准确逆变器配置补充。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 來自中國或其他市場的EMC報告應作為輸入證據，而不是吉爾吉斯斯坦TR CU 020/2011自動合規證明。請確認EAC路徑、申請人角色、可接受測試標準、型號系列覆蓋範圍，以及IEC 61000證據是否須針對準確逆變器配置補充。
